examples: A man can make a living in society, or even becomes a dominator. He must have a certain talent and can serve other so that group and other must depend on him.
In China, however, the foundation of taxation since the Qin Dynasty onward lay in that the imperial power was the final owner and dominator of all persons and their possessions.
Regrettably, the Japanese DSLR dominator had pretty early firmware on board and refused to let us take any sample pictures or video, but we were able to compile a few impressions anyhow.
